title: thelypteris retrorsa
intro: Thelypteris retrorsa, also known as the rediviva fern, is a type of evergreen fern native to tropical regions of the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris retrorsa include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
